taskVersion.name: find_reversed_word_single

parts.text:
Below is a jumbled sequence of 50 random alphanumeric strings. Within this data, there is one English word spelled backwards.

Data Block: [Zej8EhH, MD2IK, FJEly, 873qbdsl, Q4bsgXw3, snfBJHF, uzeqZcF, V1o909, Qwelle, Ed7KV, 38BWW, pm0aWg, ZIUWJ, ygU425, jCSoD, GWqkaJw, vUVFI8, g8fiV5, BnmoGJ, wdj6wPe1, GazVcd, zScotK, PMhmS0w, eUnMM, tB7Teq, XmtM1, SISYLANA, uegdbb, R2w7LQky, IYsAXxl, 42SHn6e, 5q4X4qN, wyr2WspJ, G1Qe1iG, Qqu7V2, 4ww1ir, owjOPob, 65q1fKj, Jek65y72, QJjlxP01, Y8TfK, HxVXZx, OOUdrWe0, wHUqkQF, V5r85T, naY94UA, 1nX3nM, BULvN, nQxSp, 0GcZutE]

Task: Find the English word hidden in the sequence, reverse it to its original spelling, and output only that word.
